programme.title: Real Emergency: Episode
programme.desc: Emergency responders face real-life crises, including accidents, medical emergencies, and rescue operations. The show follows paramedics, police, and firefighters as they handle high-pressure situations. Through real footage and firsthand accounts, it reveals the intensity and urgency of emergency services.

programme.title: Emergency
programme.desc: In Royal Melbourne Emergency, doctors rush to save a man bleeding internally after being thrown from a horse. A law student’s condition puzzles Dr Luke. Dr George has grave fears for a handy man who’s fallen six metres onto concrete.

programme.title: Emergency
programme.desc: In The Royal Melbourne Hospital’s Emergency Department, Drs Michelle Thornhill and Martin Dutch have seconds to spare as a man struggles to breathe. Dr Jonathan Papson fixes up an old friend suffering severe bee stings from a backyard hive.

programme.title: Emergency
programme.desc: Emergency responders face real-life crises, including accidents, medical emergencies, and rescue operations. The show follows paramedics, police, and firefighters as they handle high-pressure situations. Through real footage and firsthand accounts, it reveals the intensity and urgency of emergency services.
